title: Discover How Our Bounce House Company Offers More Than Just Fun Rentals
author: Anthony Stagliano
excerpt: When you think of a bounce house company, you probably picture colorful inflatables for kids. But our services go far beyond just inflatables — from games and miniature mobile golf to tables, tents, and event decorating.
content:
When you think of a bounce house company, you probably picture colorful inflatables dropped off for kids to jump on and then picked up after the party. While we excel at providing easy bounce house drop off and pick up, our services go far beyond just inflatables. We offer a wide range of rentals and event solutions designed to make your celebration unforgettable and stress-free. From games and miniature mobile golf to tables, tents, and chairs, plus affordable event decorating through our sister company RemedyEnt.com, we bring everything you need in one place.

More Than Just Bounce Houses

Bounce houses are a classic party favorite, but we understand that every event is unique. That's why we offer additional rentals to complement your bounce house and enhance your guests' experience.

Games That Bring Everyone Together

Adding games to your event creates interactive fun for all ages. We provide a selection of games that can fit any party theme or size, including:

  • Giant Jenga — a crowd-pleaser that encourages friendly competition.
  • Cornhole — perfect for outdoor gatherings and easy to set up.
  • Ring Toss — a simple game that kids and adults enjoy alike.

These games help break the ice and keep guests entertained between bounce house sessions or during meal times.

Miniature Mobile Golf for Unique Entertainment

Miniature mobile golf is a standout option for guests who want something different. Our portable golf setup brings the fun of mini-golf right to your event location. It's ideal for birthday parties, family reunions, corporate picnics, and community events. The course is designed to be easy to set up and suitable for all skill levels.

Essential Event Rentals: Tables, Tents, and Chairs

Planning an event involves more than just entertainment. You need practical items to ensure your guests are comfortable and your event runs smoothly. We provide tables in various sizes, comfortable chairs, and tents in multiple sizes for protection from sun or rain. Having these essentials available means you don't have to juggle multiple vendors — we deliver and pick up everything.

Affordable Event Decorating with RemedyEnt.com

Through our sister company RemedyEnt.com, we offer affordable event decorating to transform your space. Whether you want balloons, themed decorations, or custom setups, RemedyEnt.com can help you create the perfect atmosphere — including balloon arches, table centerpieces, themed party decorations, and custom banners.

Why Choose Us for Your Event?

  • Convenience — We handle delivery, setup, and pickup, saving you time and effort.
  • Variety — From bounce houses to games and event essentials, we're a one-stop shop.
  • Affordability — Competitive pricing on rentals and decorating services.
  • Customer Focus — We listen to your needs and tailor our offerings to fit your event.
  • Quality Equipment — Clean, safe, and well-maintained rentals for peace of mind.

Planning Your Event with Us

  1. Consultation — We discuss your event size, location, and preferences.
  2. Customized Package — We recommend rentals and services that suit your needs.
  3. Delivery and Setup — Our team arrives on time to set up everything.
  4. Event Support — We're available to assist if needed during your event.
  5. Pickup — After the event, we return to collect all rentals promptly.

This streamlined process helps reduce stress and ensures your event goes off without a hitch. REACH OUT TODAY — SMOOTH, EASY, SOMETHING WE WILL REMEDY!

title: Remedy Entertainment Expands Inventory with Exciting New Inflatable Attractions
author: Anthony Stagliano
excerpt: We are excited to announce the expansion of our entertainment inventory with brand new attractions — including our Inflatable Obstacle Course with Pool, a high-energy attraction combining climbing, racing, sliding, and splashing.
content:
At Remedy Entertainment, we are always looking for new ways to bring excitement, energy, and unforgettable experiences to our clients' events. As we continue to grow, we are excited to announce that we are expanding our entertainment inventory, introducing brand new attractions that will make parties and events even more fun.

One of the newest additions to our lineup is our Inflatable Obstacle Course with Pool, a high-energy attraction that combines climbing, racing, sliding, and splashing into one incredible inflatable experience.

A New Level of Fun for Parties and Events

Our inflatable obstacle course is designed to bring excitement to guests of all ages. Participants race through tunnels, climb over obstacles, slide down ramps, and finish with a splash into the attached pool. It's the perfect way to keep kids and guests active, entertained, and engaged throughout the event.

This new inflatable is ideal for a wide range of events, including:

  • Backyard birthday parties
  • School events and field days
  • Community festivals
  • Corporate family days
  • Summer parties and celebrations

Because it can be used wet or dry, it provides flexibility for different seasons and event types.

Continuing to Grow Our Entertainment Options

The addition of the obstacle course is just one example of how Remedy Entertainment is expanding its inventory to better serve our clients. Our goal is to continue offering exciting and interactive attractions that help make events memorable and stress-free.

In addition to inflatable attractions, Remedy Entertainment offers bounce houses, inflatable games, party planning services, tents, tables, chairs, and event enhancements.

Helping Clients Create Complete Events

At Remedy Entertainment, we understand that planning an event involves many moving parts. That is why we strive to be more than just an equipment provider. Our team works with clients to help create a complete event experience, providing entertainment options that keep guests smiling from start to finish.

Whether you are planning a small backyard party or a large community event, our goal is to provide the attractions and support needed to make your event successful.

Book Today

Our Inflatable Obstacle Course with Pool is now available for booking. If you're looking to add a fun, interactive attraction to your next event, we would love to help. Visit remedyrexbounce.com or contact us at anthony@remedysm.com to learn more.

At Remedy Entertainment, we believe every event should be unforgettable — and we're excited to bring even more fun your way.

title: How Remedy Entertainment is Revolutionizing Event Entertainment in Under a Year
author: Anthony Stagliano
excerpt: What started as a simple rental service has grown into a full-scale entertainment provider in under a year. This post explores how Remedy Entertainment has reshaped event entertainment and what it means for your next celebration.
content:
Event entertainment has long been dominated by familiar options like bounce houses and inflatable rentals. While these have their charm, they often limit the scope of celebration experiences. Remedy Entertainment has changed that narrative in less than a year. What started as a simple rental service has grown into a full-scale entertainment provider that transforms events into memorable experiences.

From Bounce Houses to Full Entertainment Experiences

Remedy Entertainment began with a straightforward goal: provide fun inflatables for parties and events. But the team quickly realized that customers wanted more than just a place to jump. They wanted engaging activities that could bring people together, create excitement, and make celebrations truly special.

To meet this demand, Remedy expanded its offerings beyond traditional bounce houses, adding interactive games, obstacle courses, and themed entertainment options that appeal to all ages.

Key Additions to the Entertainment Lineup

  • Interactive Game Zones — Giant Jenga, cornhole, and ring toss to foster friendly competition and social interaction.
  • Obstacle Courses — Challenging and fun, perfect for family gatherings or corporate team-building events.
  • Themed Party Packages — Carnival, superhero, tropical luau and more — complete with matching decorations and activities.

Creating Inclusive Experiences for All Ages

Remedy Entertainment understands that events often include guests of different ages and abilities. Their entertainment options reflect this by offering activities suitable for toddlers, teens, adults, and seniors alike — including gentle inflatables for young children, competitive games for teens and adults, and accessible setups for guests with mobility challenges.

Real Stories of Transformation

Several clients have shared how Remedy Entertainment's services elevated their events. One recent birthday party that initially planned only a bounce house rental turned into a full carnival-themed celebration. The addition of interactive games and a mini obstacle course kept kids and adults entertained for hours. A community festival using Remedy's services saw a 40% increase in participation compared to previous years.

Planning Made Simple

One of the challenges of event entertainment is coordinating multiple activities and vendors. Remedy Entertainment simplifies this by offering all-in-one packages that cover everything from setup to teardown. Their team works closely with clients to tailor the entertainment to the event's size, theme, and guest preferences.

Why This Matters for Your Next Event

Choosing the right entertainment can make or break a celebration. Remedy Entertainment's transformation means hosts now have access to a wider range of fun, interactive options that suit any occasion. Whether you're planning a birthday, community event, or corporate gathering, their services help you create a memorable experience that guests will talk about long after the party ends.

title: Elevating the Game: How STAGLIANO and REMEDY Sales and Marketing Takes It to the Next Level
author: Anthony Stagliano
excerpt: In the competitive landscape of event rentals, standing out is essential. Here's how Remedy Sales and Marketing has taken the industry by storm with Remedy Rex's Bouncy House and Inflatables.
content:
In the competitive landscape of event rentals, standing out is essential. At Remedy Sales and Marketing, innovation and creativity are at the forefront of our mission. We've taken the industry by storm with our unique approach to creating engaging experiences, exemplified by our flagship offering, Remedy Rex's Bouncy House and Inflatables.

1. Understanding Our Audience

Our journey begins with a deep understanding of our target audience. We recognize that events are not just about renting equipment — they are about creating memorable experiences. By gathering insights into what families, schools, and corporate clients are looking for, we tailor our offerings to meet their needs. This customer-centric approach informs every decision we make.

2. Innovative Design and Themes

Remedy Rex is not just a bouncy house; it's an experience! Our design team works tirelessly to create eye-catching, vibrant, and safe inflatable structures that resonate with both children and adults. We incorporate popular themes and characters, ensuring that our inflatables are not only fun but also visually appealing.

3. Quality and Safety Standards

At Remedy Sales and Marketing, safety is paramount. We adhere to the highest standards, ensuring all inflatables are made from durable, high-quality materials. Regular maintenance and safety checks guarantee that our equipment is not only fun but also safe for all users. This commitment to quality instills confidence in our clients and makes us a trusted choice.

4. Diverse Product Range

While Remedy Rex's Bouncy House is a highlight, our offerings extend far beyond inflatables. We provide a comprehensive range of rental products including games, tents, tables, and chairs. This diversity allows us to cater to various events, from birthday parties and community festivals to corporate picnics and school carnivals.

5. Exceptional Customer Service

Our team prides itself on delivering an exceptional customer experience from the initial inquiry to the final teardown. We offer personalized consultations to help clients choose the right products for their events, ensuring that every detail is considered. Our friendly and professional staff are trained to handle setups and take-downs efficiently.

6. Engaging Marketing Strategies

To promote Remedy Rex's Bouncy House and our other offerings, we employ innovative marketing strategies that resonate with our audience — from social media campaigns showcasing our inflatables in action to collaborations with local influencers and event planners.

7. Building Community Connections

We understand that successful events are often rooted in community engagement. Remedy Sales and Marketing actively participates in local events and sponsorships, showcasing our inflatables and connecting with potential clients. By building relationships within the community, we cultivate loyalty and establish ourselves as a go-to resource for event needs.

At REMEDY REX'S, we are committed to taking event rentals to the next level. Our passion for creating unforgettable experiences drives us to continually evolve and enhance our offerings. Whether you're planning a birthday party, a corporate event, or a community festival, let us help you elevate your gathering!
